title: Saudi Arabian Fish Tagine
description: A unique fusion dish blending Indian spices and Saudi Arabian flavors, featuring a tender fish fillet cooked in a flavorful tagine.
instructions: Heat ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add cumin powder and let it sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the fish fillets, skin side up, and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the fish over and add the garam masala, turmeric powder, and red chili powder.
Pour in enough water to cover the fish and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped fresh coriander and serve hot.
Serve over basmati rice or with saudi flatbread for a complete meal.
